category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Angola, compared against the China GB/T 3883 domestic baseline.

title.en: China-to-Angola Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入安哥拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入安哥拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Angola requirements: IANORQ national standards adopting IEC, conformity and import inspection, INACOM radio approval for cordless tools, Portuguese-language documentation, electrical safety, EMC, noise, restricted substances, and battery considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与安哥拉要求差距对照：IANORQ 采用 IEC 的国家标准、符合性与进口检验、无绳工具的 INACOM 无线电核准、葡萄牙语文件、电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声、限用物质及电池考量。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與安哥拉要求差距對照：IANORQ 採用 IEC 的國家標準、符合性與進口檢驗、無繩工具的 INACOM 無線電核准、葡萄牙語文件、電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲、限用物質及電池考量。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Angola law, IANORQ national standards, INACOM radio rules, import-inspection practice, Portuguese-documentation requirements, and destination-country enforcement with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行安哥拉法律、IANORQ 国家标准、INACOM 无线电规则、进口检验实践、葡萄牙语文件要求及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行安哥拉法律、IANORQ 國家標準、INACOM 無線電規則、進口檢驗實務、葡萄牙語文件要求及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Angola, the practical baseline is conformity to IANORQ national standards (commonly adopting IEC 62841 safety and IEC EMC standards), import inspection and conformity controls, Portuguese-language documentation, and INACOM radio approval for cordless tools that contain radio modules. Angola uses 220 V at 50 Hz; the 50 Hz frequency matches China but voltage configuration differs from China 220/380 V networks. There is no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking scheme, so noise should be handled honestly as a general safety and IEC-test matter rather than an Angola-specific product label.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入安哥拉，实务基线是符合 IANORQ 国家标准（通常采用 IEC 62841 安全标准及 IEC 电磁兼容标准）、进口检验与符合性管控、葡萄牙语文件，以及含无线电模块的无绳工具的 INACOM 无线电核准。安哥拉采用 220 V、50 Hz；50 Hz 频率与中国相同，但电压配置与中国 220/380 V 电网不同。安哥拉没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声应作为一般安全与 IEC 测试事项如实处理，而非安哥拉专属产品标签。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入安哥拉，實務基線是符合 IANORQ 國家標準（通常採用 IEC 62841 安全標準及 IEC 電磁相容標準）、進口檢驗與符合性管控、葡萄牙語文件，以及含無線電模組的無繩工具的 INACOM 無線電核准。安哥拉採用 220 V、50 Hz；50 Hz 頻率與中國相同，但電壓配置與中國 220/380 V 電網不同。安哥拉沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲應作為一般安全與 IEC 測試事項如實處理，而非安哥拉專屬產品標籤。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows are AI-generated drafts pending named human review; sources must be re-verified before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Local PDFs are not accepted. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred.
